privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan is a real home design software by NCH Software that runs on Windows 11. The task design_outdoor_kitchen requires users to create an outdoor kitchen design in DreamPlan's built-in Contemporary House sample project. The task has a 5-minute timeout (300 seconds) and 40-step maximum, with medium difficulty. Users must place at least 6 items total: a Barbecue Grill, a Dining Table (or Prep Table), and a minimum of 4 Chairs in an outdoor patio/backyard area. The verifier uses VLM analysis of a screenshot (expected at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\outdoor_kitchen_design.png) to verify the design contains these elements and is set in an outdoor context. Passing requires 70+ points: 20 points for screenshot creation, 10 points for project save, and 50 points for visual content (15 for grill, 15 for table, 10 for 4+ chairs, 10 for outdoor setting), plus 20 points for workflow verification.
